summary: All shared types for the TUI package: view IDs, display items, tea.Msg types, service interfaces, and wizard state

observations.text: Service interfaces (RefreshService, SummarizeService) are defined here in the consumer package (tui), not in the provider packages — classic dependency-inversion. This decouples the TUI from concrete refresh and summarizer implementations.
types.go imports tg-digest/internal/refresh and tg-digest/internal/summarizer solely for return types in interface methods and message structs. All other tui files are insulated from those packages.
switchViewMsg{view: -1} is used as a sentinel to signal 'close help overlay' — the -1 value does not correspond to any viewID constant and is checked explicitly in app.go.
addStep enum drives a 3-step wizard (type selection → name input → URL input) owned by channelsModel.
